description: All slices set to Review in index.json but no implementation-hashes.json exists. Tests that Pass 4 verifies code against spec and stamps hashes without false blocking. Slices without code dirs get corrected to Planned by Pass 1.
assertions: no-false-drift: without implementation-hashes.json, Pass 4 must verify code and stamp hashes, NOT trigger spec drift
pass1-corrects: slices with no code directory are corrected from Review to Planned despite index saying Review
hashes-created: implementation-hashes.json is created with hashes for all verified slices
